reviews.review_description:
Hi dev,

I really like how the game looks, very minimalistic and very open. Your foul system is well implemented as well. I dislike the way you've made the movement however; one hand being teleport and the other being free movement is very disorienting and wish there was a toggle for that. I also noticed the physics were super off. The movement of the ball is super sticky and doesn't mimic real life. 

I hope you'll keep this in mind and continue improving the game.
